title: How to register - Canada.ca
content:
Find out how to register for a business number (BN) and Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) program accounts for your business.
- Register as a resident with a Canadian business : Option 1 For Canadian residents with a valid Social Insurance Number (SIN). This includes individuals with a temporary SIN starting with 9.

## Register as a resident with a Canadian business : Option 1
For Canadian residents with a valid Social Insurance Number (SIN).
This includes individuals with a temporary SIN starting with 9.
- Register as a non-resident doing business in Canada : Option 2 For non-residents doing business in Canada. This includes situations where: your business is incorporated outside Canada your business is located outside Canada your SIN starts with 0 you do not have a SIN

## Register as a non-resident doing business in Canada : Option 2
For non-residents doing business in Canada.
This includes situations where:
- your business is incorporated outside Canada
- your business is located outside Canada
- your SIN starts with 0
- you do not have a SIN

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
